name: OpenSearch domain encryption at rest disabled
description: Encryption at rest is not enabled for this OpenSearch domain. Without encryption, data stored in indices, automated snapshots, and swap files is readable by anyone with physical or hypervisor-level access to the underlying storage.
remediation: Enable encryption at rest when creating a new domain (cannot be enabled on an existing domain without recreation). Use an AWS-managed key or a KMS CMK. Recreate the domain with encryption enabled and migrate the data.
